languages.text: "О?" {n}Себериан чуть распрямляет плечи.{/n} "Что вы хотите узнать?"
"Oh?" {n}Seberian straightens his shoulders slightly.{/n} "What do you wish to know?"

languages.text: "Oh?" {n}Seberian strafft seine Schultern ein wenig.{/n} "Was wollt Ihr wissen?"
languages.original_text: "Oh?" {n}Seberian straightens his shoulders slightly.{/n} "What do you wish to know?"

languages.text: « Oh ? {n}Seberian se redresse légèrement.{/n} Que voulez-vous savoir ? »
languages.original_text: "Oh?" {n}Seberian straightens his shoulders slightly.{/n} "What do you wish to know?"

traits.locale_text: « Oh ? {n}Seberian se redresse légèrement.{/n} Que voulez-vous savoir ? »

languages.text: «¿Oh?». {n}Seberian endereza ligeramente los hombros.{/n} «¿Qué quiere saber?».
languages.original_text: "Oh?" {n}Seberian straightens his shoulders slightly.{/n} "What do you wish to know?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Oh?». {n}Seberian endereza ligeramente los hombros.{/n} «¿Qué quiere saber?».

languages.text: "Öyle mi?" {n}Seberian, omuzlarını hafifçe dikleştiriyor.{/n} "Ne öğrenmek istiyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "Oh?" {n}Seberian straightens his shoulders slightly.{/n} "What do you wish to know?"

traits.locale_text: "Öyle mi?" {n}Seberian, omuzlarını hafifçe dikleştiriyor.{/n} "Ne öğrenmek istiyorsun?"

languages.text: “哦？”{n}塞贝里安微微挺直了肩膀。{/n}“你想知道什么？”
languages.original_text: "Oh?" {n}Seberian straightens his shoulders slightly.{/n} "What do you wish to know?"

traits.locale_text: “哦？”{n}塞贝里安微微挺直了肩膀。{/n}“你想知道什么？”

languages.text: 「ああ？」{n}セベリアンは肩を少し真っ直ぐにする。{/n}「何を知りたいのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Oh?" {n}Seberian straightens his shoulders slightly.{/n} "What do you wish to know?"
